title: Ken-chan Arrives! This Transfer Student Is Amazing!
overview: Get ready to enter the world of kendama, the Japanese skill toy Ken has dedicated his weird, wacky life to mastering!

title: Cry! Laugh! Die! A Delicious, Dangerous Dish
overview: To save the reputation of Kendama Academy after an insidious food poisoning plot, Ken faces off against genius kendama chef Erika in a no-holds-barred kendama grudge match!

title: Don't Stop! A Speeding Corpse!
overview: Winter vacation is here! Ken and his friends head to a mountain getaway to learn to ski, but soon the snow poses a chilling problem only kendama can solve.

title: Shine On! Diamond Kendama!
overview: Ken’s beloved kendama was sabotaged! Is it possible to replace something with such sentimental value? Ken thinks not. Ken’s friends, meanwhile, argue it will only cost 56 yen.

title: Kendama Android #103
overview: A meteorite just made mincemeat of Mitsurugi, but that doesn’t mean he’s down for the count just yet. The Human Kendama Project has only just begun…

title: Ultimate Battle! My Old Man Really Was Strong
overview: A evil secret organization, Illegal Toy Works, is up to no good! Can Ken band together with ramen (like, a literal bowl of ramen) and save the day?

title: Heart Pounding Life And Death School Trip!
overview: Ken’s first-ever school trip takes him to the exciting destination of… uh, somewhere. Where the heck is this bus going, anyway!?

title: The Heinous Train Arc : First Part
overview: A wild night out lands Ken in a kendama-shaped predicament! Also he’s kendama-shaped in general now. It’s a whole big thing.

title: The Heinous Train Arc : Middle Part
overview: Saori just revealed her evil plan to…um…well, we’re not entirely what she’s after. Her villainous monologue was pretty vague. Maybe workshop that a little, girl!

title: The Heinous Train Arc : Final Part
overview: “Kendama corrupts. Absolute kendama corrupts absolutely.” We’re pretty sure that’s how the saying goes, because Ken has been totally corrupted by kendama in the season finale!
